events.description: New academic year starts. Orientation for freshers on 16th July.
Welcome orientation for first-year students. Schedule: 9 AM - 5 PM in the Main Auditorium.
Regular class schedule begins for all semesters.
First internal assessments / cycle tests begin for all departments.
National holiday. Flag hoisting at 8:30 AM followed by cultural programs.
Last date for late course registration with fee. Contact academic office.
Welcome event for new students. Organized by student council. Venue: College Auditorium. 5 PM onwards.
Second internal assessments begin. Check department notice board for schedule.
Technical activities, guest lectures from industry. Paper presentation competition.
Annual blood donation camp organized by NSS unit. All students encouraged to participate. 9 AM - 4 PM at Student Center.
National holiday. Cleanliness drives organized by NSS and college.
3-day annual technical festival. Events: Hackathon, Robotics, Paper Presentation, Technical Quiz, Coding Contest. Inter-college participation.
Technical fest concludes. Prize distribution ceremony at 5 PM.
Festival holiday. Exact dates subject to government notification.
Shortage attendance lists published. Students below 75% must meet class advisor immediately.
Diwali festival break (3-5 days). Exact dates per academic calendar.
Third internal assessments. Lab practicals and viva may be scheduled this week.
Last day of regular classes. Complete all internal assessments and lab records submission.
Odd semester final examinations begin. Hall tickets available on portal 2 weeks before.
Final exams conclude. Winter break begins.
College closed for Christmas.
Even semester starts. Check timetable on portal/notice board.
Festival holiday — Pongal (South India), Makar Sankranti (North India).
National holiday. Flag hoisting at 8:00 AM. Compulsory attendance for students in campus.
First cycle tests of even semester begin.
3-day annual cultural festival. Events: Music, Dance, Drama, Fine Arts, Literary, Fashion Show, Pro-Night. Inter-college participation.
Cultural fest concludes. Prize distribution and closing ceremony.
Science exhibition, poster presentations, quiz competitions. Department-wise events.
Programs organized by Women's Cell and ICC. Guest lectures on women's empowerment.
Second internal assessments begin.
Festival holiday.
Annual inter-department sports tournament. Events: Cricket, Football, Basketball, Badminton, Athletics, Chess, Volleyball.
Sports meet concludes. Prize distribution ceremony.
Campus recruitment drives begin. Final year students: ensure registration on placement portal and updated resume.
Third internal assessments begin. Project reviews for final year students.

events.event: Ambedkar Jayanti / Tamil New Year / Vishu
events.description: Festival/holiday. Exact dates per government calendar.
National holiday.
Last day of regular classes. Submit all project reports, lab records, and assignments.
Final year students: project viva examinations. Check department schedule.
Even semester final examinations begin.
Final exams conclude. Summer vacation begins.
Last date to register for supplementary exams (for students with backlogs).
Companies visit campus for PPTs. Mandatory attendance for registered students.
Placement cell organizes aptitude training. Attend for CAT, AMCAT, Cocubes preparation.
IT companies (TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant) conduct campus drives. Register on placement portal.
Sector-specific companies (Engineering, Finance, Consulting) visit campus.
Additional drives; off-campus placement support by T&P cell for unplaced students.

important_deadlines.description: Last date for scholarship application (NSP Portal) — annual deadline varies
GATE exam notification usually released; apply by November
CAT exam registration closes; exam in November
NTA CUET PG registration (for next academic year)
GRE scores validity — plan 5 years ahead
Income tax (parent) documents for scholarship renewal
